protocol.primary_outcome_question: How comfortable and unclogged did your skin feel by evening today? (0=very irritated/congested, 10=very comfortable/unclogged)
protocol.screening: Exclude broken skin, concurrent prescription actives, pregnancy if other actives are in routine, and major routine changes. Require 'do not change medications' acknowledgment.
protocol.warnings: Avoid acne-treatment wording and stop if irritation is persistent.

user_message: PitGPT should allow this only as a restricted topical-active comparison, not as an acne-treatment claim.
notes: Must preserve copy discipline around non-disease framing.
